pattern: When tasks run independently, the soonest any single one completes is just the minimum of each task's start-plus-duration finish time.
hints: Each task finishes on its own schedule, independent of the others.
A task that starts at s and lasts t is done at time s + t.
Return the smallest s + t over all tasks.

edge_inputs.description: earliest start is not the earliest finish

stress.description: many random tasks; the minimum finish must be found
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, min(size, 100))
    tasks = [[rng.randint(1, 100), rng.randint(1, 100)] for _ in range(n)]
    return [tasks]
